chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 480 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.2588/2019 2. For hearing of main case 3. For order on CMA No.2589/2019 02.02.2026 Mr. Azad Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2019 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought till date. Diary demonstrates that in the last seven years applicant has not endeavored to have the matter listed and / or heard. Even brief is being held on behalf of applicant’s counsel and adjournment sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
